---
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    code-link: true
    highlight-style: a11y
    chalkboard: true
    theme:
      - lh_slides_style.scss ### this lives in folder with slide qmd file
execute:
  echo: true
  code-line-numbers: false
---

##
![](images/01_table_and_viz.png){fig-align="center"}

##
![](images/02_mapping.png){fig-align="center"}

##
![](images/03_scales_and_guides.png){fig-align="center"}

##
![](images/04_geometry.png){fig-align="center"}

##
![](images/05_final_viz.png){fig-align="center"}
